text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today marks the start of another summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... The sun is scorching, isn't it? It's been a
while since I've felt such heat.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it's been a year already.
choice_data_list: It's a bit early to wax nostalgic.
It's a bit early to wax nostalgic.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run the ultimate race, on the ultimate
course... against the ultimate racers.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So don't hold back on the training this year,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So don't hold back on the training this year,
okay?
